offer: For logistics finance teams processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes cash flow gaps. We convert vendor delivery logs into invoice-ready data instead of manual data entry and reconciliation.
problem: Manual data entry from vendor delivery logs is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics finance teams
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics finance teams with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and workflows
try_it: Let users try data validation checks and export to CSV format on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
